lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Previously on The Glitch in the Glass: Sam's research unveiled chilling folklore surrounding doorway mirrors. Their reflections, now gaunt and desperate, were trapped in a desolate version of their world, a reflected door standing ajar.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: I can’t stop thinking about what Sam found. The doorway mirrors. The soul traps.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: It’s just old stories, Chloe. Someone made them up a long time ago.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: But the reflections… they’re real. I looked again this morning. My reflection… it looks so tired, so afraid.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: Mine too. Like it hasn't slept in weeks. And that door in the reflection… it’s wider now.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: As Maya spoke, they all looked toward the antique mirror in her dusty attic bedroom. The reflected door, once ajar, now gaped a little more, revealing only deeper shadow within.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: Okay, fine. It's creepy. But it’s still just a reflection. It can’t actually… do anything.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Just as Liam finished his sentence, his reflection in the mirror moved. Not just mirroring his expression, but deliberately, slowly, it raised its reflected hand.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The reflected hand pressed flat against the glass, then tapped, once. A faint, almost imperceptible sound, yet undeniably there, echoing in the quiet room.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: What the… No. That’s not possible.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: It’s trying to communicate. Like it’s trapped on the other side.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: And it’s trying to get out. Or… get in.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: A cold, invisible dread filled the room, a pressure that seemed to push them closer to the shimmering surface. The air felt heavy, as if their own reality was thinning, stretching taut.

lines.speaker: Chloe
lines.text: I feel… dizzy. Like the room is tilting.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: It’s like the mirror is calling us. Drawing us in.

lines.speaker: Liam
lines.text: We need to cover it. Now. Before it does something else.

lines.speaker: Maya
lines.text: It won’t help, Liam. I feel it. It’s already here. And it’s getting stronger.

scene_prompts.framing: CLOSE UP on Maya's face, mid-shot
scene_prompts.character: Maya, looking distressed, eyes wide with a mix of fear and resignation.
scene_prompts.lighting: Soft, cool ambient light, with a subtle blue cast, emphasizing her pallor and a single highlight on her tear-filled eye.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurred antique lace curtain in the foreground, Maya's face sharp in the midground, the dark, undefined corner of a room in the background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: The subtle vertical lines of the lace curtain guide the eye to Maya's worried expression.
scene_prompts.colour: Muted blues and grays, a sense of quiet dread.

scene_prompts.character: The four friends (Maya, Liam, Chloe, Sam) are clustered together, their backs slightly to the camera, looking towards something off-frame with concerned expressions.
scene_prompts.lighting: Moody, directional light from an unseen window, casting long, soft shadows and highlighting the dust motes in the air.
scene_prompts.depth: A forgotten, dust-covered wooden chair in the foreground, the friends in sharp focus, a blurry, ornate mirror frame partially visible in the deep background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: The leading lines of a dusty, worn floorboard guide the viewer's eye towards the group.
scene_prompts.colour: Warm browns and sepia tones, but with an underlying cool blue for tension.

scene_prompts.framing: CLOSE UP on Sam's face, slightly off-center
scene_prompts.character: Sam, looking pale and sleep-deprived, a flicker of genuine terror in his eyes.
scene_prompts.lighting: Harsh, unmotivated overhead light casting deep shadows under his eyes, emphasizing his exhaustion.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurred hand (possibly Chloe's) reaching out slightly in the foreground, Sam's face sharp, and a dark, indistinct background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: None specific, the framing draws immediate attention to his face.
scene_prompts.colour: Desaturated, almost monochromatic, emphasizing the drain on his energy.

scene_prompts.character: The four friends stand several feet back from the antique mirror, which is now the focal point. The reflected door within the mirror is noticeably wider, a deeper void.
scene_prompts.lighting: Eerie, soft glow emanating *from* the mirror itself, subtly illuminating the friends' faces, contrasting with the dim attic lighting.
scene_prompts.depth: Dust motes suspended in the air in the foreground, the friends in the midground, and the prominent, ominous mirror in the background, its depth inviting the eye.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: The perspective of the dusty attic floorboards leads directly to the mirror.
scene_prompts.colour: Cool blues and deep blacks, with a sickly yellow glow from the mirror.

scene_prompts.character: Liam, with a defiant but increasingly strained expression, trying to maintain his skeptical composure.
scene_prompts.lighting: A stark, single light source from the left, creating harsh shadows on the right side of his face, implying a loss of control.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurry, ornate mirror frame edge in the foreground, Liam's face sharp, and the indistinct reflections of his friends in the background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: None specific, focus is purely on his face.
scene_prompts.colour: Greys and muted browns, a feeling of being trapped.

scene_prompts.framing: OVER THE SHOULDER SHOT, from behind Maya
scene_prompts.character: Liam's reflection in the mirror, distinct from Liam himself, slowly raising its hand. The reflection looks gaunt and desperate.
scene_prompts.lighting: The mirror's reflection is subtly brighter and flatter, with a sickly greenish tint, emphasizing the unreality of the reflection.
scene_prompts.depth: Maya's shoulder and the back of her head in the foreground, Liam's reflected hand sharp in the midground, the shadowy, desolate reflected room in the background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: The line of Maya's shoulder directs the viewer's gaze to the reflection.
scene_prompts.colour: Desaturated greens and purples, a sense of unhealthiness and alienness.

scene_prompts.character: Chloe, eyes wide with horror, a hand flying to her mouth.
scene_prompts.lighting: Dramatic rim lighting from the top, casting her face into partial shadow, highlighting her expression of terror.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurred antique necklace in the foreground, Chloe's face sharp in the midground, and a dark, indistinct background.
scene_prompts.colour: Deep shadows and sharp highlights, emphasizing the intensity of the moment.

scene_prompts.framing: EXTREME CLOSE UP on Liam's reflected hand in the mirror
scene_prompts.character: The gaunt, desperate reflected hand of Liam, tapping *once* on the glass. The focus is on the impact point.
scene_prompts.lighting: Subtle, ethereal light seems to originate from the tap itself, creating a ripple effect of light across the glass surface.
scene_prompts.depth: The sharp focus on the tapping hand on the glass, with a blurry background of the desolation beyond.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: None, the tap is the focal point.
scene_prompts.emotion: Chilling ambiguity, a sense of impossible contact.
scene_prompts.colour: Cool blues and whites, a stark contrast to the surrounding gloom.

scene_prompts.framing: TWO SHOT, over Liam's shoulder looking at the mirror
scene_prompts.character: Liam and Sam, both staring at the mirror, expressions of disbelief and dawning horror. Liam's reflection looks desperate and pleading.
scene_prompts.lighting: The ambient attic light is now almost completely gone, replaced by the eerie, sickly glow from the mirror, bathing their faces in unnatural light.
scene_prompts.depth: Liam's shoulder in the foreground, the two friends' faces in the midground, and the mirror's unsettling reflection filling the background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: The edge of the mirror frame acts as a leading line towards the desperate reflection.
scene_prompts.emotion: Disbelief turning to terror, a feeling of the impossible becoming real.
scene_prompts.colour: Unnatural greens and yellows from the mirror, contrasting with deep, cool shadows.

scene_prompts.character: Sam, theorizing, his eyes darting between the mirror and his friends, a new understanding dawning.
scene_prompts.lighting: Motivated light from an unseen window, cutting across his face, half in light, half in shadow, reflecting his internal conflict.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurry, reflective surface (the mirror's edge) in the foreground, Sam's sharp face, and the blurred figures of his friends in the background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: None, the focus is Sam's expression.
scene_prompts.colour: Cool blues and purples, a sense of cold logic applied to horror.

scene_prompts.character: Maya, looking from Sam to the mirror, her expression shifting from fear to a deeper, more unsettling comprehension.
scene_prompts.lighting: Soft, diffused light from above, highlighting her features but leaving shadows in her eye sockets, making her look haunted.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurred, ornate pattern on a wall in the foreground, Maya's face sharp, and a dark, indistinct background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: None, focus is on her face.
scene_prompts.emotion: Deep-seated dread, a feeling of being understood by the threat.
scene_prompts.colour: Dark greens and browns, a muted, earthy palette that feels suffocating.

scene_prompts.framing: MEDIUM WIDE SHOT of the room
scene_prompts.character: The four friends are all subtly leaning forward, their bodies drawn almost imperceptibly towards the mirror. The air around them seems to shimmer.
scene_prompts.lighting: The light in the room dims further, creating a sense of oppression. The mirror's glow is now the dominant light source, subtly distorting their features.
scene_prompts.depth: A forgotten piece of furniture in the foreground, the friends in the midground, and the mirror's shimmering surface filling the background, acting like a magnet.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: Invisible lines of force seem to pull the friends towards the mirror, emphasized by their body language.
scene_prompts.emotion: Irresistible pull, existential dread, a sense of weakening reality.
scene_prompts.colour: Deep blues and purples, with a sickly, almost hallucinatory glow from the mirror.

scene_prompts.character: Chloe, gripping her head, looking disoriented, her eyes wide as if the room is indeed spinning.
scene_prompts.lighting: Flickering, unstable light, casting dancing shadows on her face, reflecting her internal disarray.
scene_prompts.depth: A blurred hand (her own) in the foreground, Chloe's face sharp, and a rapidly blurring background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: None, the focus is on her disoriented state.
scene_prompts.emotion: Physical manifestation of the dread, disorientation.
scene_prompts.colour: Washed-out greens and grays, a feeling of nausea and instability.

scene_prompts.framing: OVER THE SHOULDER SHOT, looking at the mirror
scene_prompts.character: Maya is looking directly into the mirror, her reflection now almost indistinguishable from her real self in its despair. She seems resigned.
scene_prompts.lighting: The mirror's reflection is now almost hyper-real, brighter and more defined than the actual room, making the reflected world seem more 'present'.
scene_prompts.depth: Maya's shoulder in the foreground, her face in the midground, and the intense, almost beckoning mirror reflection in the background.
scene_prompts.leading_lines: The direct gaze of Maya into the mirror pulls the viewer's eye into the reflection itself.
scene_prompts.emotion: Resignation, overwhelming power of the mirror, an inevitable doom.
scene_prompts.colour: Intense, glowing whites and deep, inviting blacks from the mirror, contrasting with the rapidly fading reality of the room.

youtube_title: The Glitch in the Glass — Ep 6: A Desperate Tap
youtube_description: The antique mirror intensifies its sinister hold. As reflections tap for help, the friends feel their own reality weaken. Will they escape the mirror's pull? #HorrorStory #PsychologicalHorror #SupernaturalThrills. Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more original horror fiction!
tiktok_caption: Their reflections just tapped on the mirror. Not mirroring them, but *at* them. And now the whole room feels like it's pulling them in. What would you do? 😨 #creepy #mirror #horrorstory #unsettling
pinned_comment: If your reflection tapped at you, what would be the first thing you'd do?
recap_for_next: Liam's reflection in the mirror tapped on the glass, attempting to communicate. The friends felt an increasing, almost physical pull towards the mirror, their reality seeming to weaken as the reflected world became more tangible.
narration: Previously on The Glitch in the Glass: Sam's research unveiled chilling folklore surrounding doorway mirrors. Their reflections, now gaunt and desperate, were trapped in a desolate version of their world, a reflected door standing ajar. I can’t stop thinking about what Sam found. The doorway mirrors. The soul traps. It’s just old stories, Chloe. Someone made them up a long time ago. But the reflections… they’re real. I looked again this morning. My reflection… it looks so tired, so afraid. Mine too. Like it hasn't slept in weeks. And that door in the reflection… it’s wider now. As Maya spoke, they all looked toward the antique mirror in her dusty attic bedroom. The reflected door, once ajar, now gaped a little more, revealing only deeper shadow within. Okay, fine. It's creepy. But it’s still just a reflection. It can’t actually… do anything. Just as Liam finished his sentence, his reflection in the mirror moved. Not just mirroring his expression, but deliberately, slowly, it raised its reflected hand. Liam… look! The reflected hand pressed flat against the glass, then tapped, once. A faint, almost imperceptible sound, yet undeniably there, echoing in the quiet room. What the… No. That’s not possible. It’s trying to communicate. Like it’s trapped on the other side. And it’s trying to get out. Or… get in. A cold, invisible dread filled the room, a pressure that seemed to push them closer to the shimmering surface. The air felt heavy, as if their own reality was thinning, stretching taut. I feel… dizzy. Like the room is tilting. It’s like the mirror is calling us. Drawing us in. We need to cover it. Now. Before it does something else. It won’t help, Liam. I feel it. It’s already here. And it’s getting stronger.
title: The Glitch in the Glass — Ep 6: A Desperate Tap
